OrchestrateReviewsInitState.description: State model derived from OrchestrateReviewsInit TLA+ spec

TypeOK.message:
TypeOK violation: /\ max_retries \in Nat
    /\ \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] \in Nat
    /\ budget_exhausted \subseteq PassNa...
TypeOK.description: Verifier for invariant TypeOK from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

DefaultRetries.description: Verifier for invariant DefaultRetries from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

TotalAttemptsPerPass.message: TotalAttemptsPerPass violation: \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] <= max_retries + 1
TotalAttemptsPerPass.description: Verifier for invariant TotalAttemptsPerPass from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

CountsNonNegative.description: Verifier for invariant CountsNonNegative from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

conditions:
\A p \in PassNames :
        p \in budget_exhausted => attempt_counts[p] > max_retries
BudgetExhaustionSound.message:
BudgetExhaustionSound violation: \A p \in PassNames :
        p \in budget_exhausted => attempt_counts[p] > max_retries
BudgetExhaustionSound.description: Verifier for invariant BudgetExhaustionSound from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

BudgetExhaustionComplete.message:
BudgetExhaustionComplete violation: \A p \in PassNames :
        (attempt_counts[p] > max_retries /\ p \notin completed_passes)
            => p \in budg...
BudgetExhaustionComplete.description: Verifier for invariant BudgetExhaustionComplete from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

DisjointTermination.description: Verifier for invariant DisjointTermination from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

InitialCountsZero.message:
InitialCountsZero violation: phase = "init" =>
        \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] = 0
InitialCountsZero.description: Verifier for invariant InitialCountsZero from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_TypeOK.condition:
and max_retries in Nat
    and \A p in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] in Nat
    and budget_exhausted \subseteq PassNames
    and completed_passes \subseteq PassNames
    and phase in {"init", "running", "done"}
assert_TypeOK.message:
Assertion failed: TypeOK — /\ max_retries \in Nat
    /\ \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] \in Nat
    /\ budget_exhausted \subseteq PassNa...
assert_TypeOK.description: Test assertion for TypeOK from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_DefaultRetries.description: Test assertion for DefaultRetries from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_TotalAttemptsPerPass.message: Assertion failed: TotalAttemptsPerPass — \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] <= max_retries + 1
assert_TotalAttemptsPerPass.description: Test assertion for TotalAttemptsPerPass from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_CountsNonNegative.message: Assertion failed: CountsNonNegative — \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] >= 0
assert_CountsNonNegative.description: Test assertion for CountsNonNegative from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_BudgetExhaustionSound.condition:
\A p in PassNames :
        p in budget_exhausted implies attempt_counts[p] > max_retries
assert_BudgetExhaustionSound.message:
Assertion failed: BudgetExhaustionSound — \A p \in PassNames :
        p \in budget_exhausted => attempt_counts[p] > max_retries
assert_BudgetExhaustionSound.description: Test assertion for BudgetExhaustionSound from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_BudgetExhaustionComplete.condition:
\A p in PassNames :
        (attempt_counts[p] > max_retries and p not in completed_passes)
            implies p in budget_exhausted
assert_BudgetExhaustionComplete.message:
Assertion failed: BudgetExhaustionComplete — \A p \in PassNames :
        (attempt_counts[p] > max_retries /\ p \notin completed_passes)
            => p \in budg...
assert_BudgetExhaustionComplete.description: Test assertion for BudgetExhaustionComplete from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_DisjointTermination.description: Test assertion for DisjointTermination from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

assert_InitialCountsZero.condition:
phase = "init" implies
        \A p in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] = 0
assert_InitialCountsZero.message:
Assertion failed: InitialCountsZero — phase = "init" =>
        \A p \in PassNames : attempt_counts[p] = 0
assert_InitialCountsZero.description: Test assertion for InitialCountsZero from OrchestrateReviewsInit spec

test_scenarios.name: scenario_OrchestrateReviewsInit_BudgetExhaustionComplete_0
test_scenarios.expected_outcome: BudgetExhaustionComplete should hold but was violated at state 1

test_scenarios.name: scenario_OrchestrateReviewsInit_BudgetExhaustionComplete_1
